name: Pork Roast (Korean Chaeyuk Kui)
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Pork shoulder or other lean pork
recipeInstructions:
This dish is fairly spicy, as it gets its highly seasoned flavor from kochee chang (Red Bean Paste). If this ingredient is not available, Japanese miso sauce may be substituted. Although the amount indicated is recommended, you can use a little less.
1. Cut the pork into 4 or 5 slices about 1/4 inch thick.
2. Mince the scallions and garlic. Combine them with the remaining seasonings in a bowl. Add the pork slices and mix well until all sides of the pork are coated.
3. Grill immediately or marinate until ready to serve. It is important that the pork be well done; the outside should be dark, almost charred. A charcoal grill, electric grill, or oven grill may be used.
